qa_pairs.question: What are the web addresses for the New Arbutus Cloud Object Storage and the Legacy Arbutus Cloud Object Storage?
qa_pairs.answer: The New Arbutus Cloud Object Storage endpoint is https://object-arbutus.alliancecan.ca, and the Legacy Arbutus Cloud Object Storage endpoint is https://object-arbutus.cloud.computecanada.ca.

qa_pairs.question: What important considerations should be kept in mind regarding bucket Access Control Lists (ACLs) and user/project UUIDs when migrating Object Storage data to the New Arbutus Cloud?
qa_pairs.answer: When migrating Object Storage data, users should be cautious that most tools do not preserve bucket ACLs, meaning they may need to be recreated in the new environment. Additionally, any user or project UUIDs referenced will be different in the New Arbutus Cloud.
